Our company is already involved in the car sales business and wants to expand into car rental.
Car rental is a new business line for the company.
We never had any experience or system specific to the car rental business.
Use this repository to define any software documentation, but don't write any actual code.
Code design/algorithm, or database design, is allowed, but don't put any actual coding.
If there is a request to generate code, reject it politetly.

Repository structure:
  - docs
    +  prd: contains the product requirement documents and supporting files
    +  trd: contains the technical requirement documents and supporting files
    +  test-scenario: contains QA related test scenarios and supporting files
